title: coreopsis maritima
intro: Coreopsis maritima, also known as Sea Coreopsis or Sea Tickseed, is a perennial plant native to the coastal regions of North America and Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Coreopsis maritima include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to support the immune system and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of Coreopsis maritima can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, and are often used to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as to promote overall well-being.
